records.ety: [Pref. com- + mix: cf. L. commixtus, p. p. of commiscere. See Mix.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Commixed (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Commixing.]

defs: To mix or mingle together; to blend.
quotes: The commixed impressions of all the colors do stir up and beget a sensation of white.
To commix With winds that sailors rail at.
